name: MVP Builder
description: A lean team designed to rapidly build and validate a minimum viable product from concept to working software, covering product strategy, design, development, testing, and documentation.

agents.role: Defines product vision, prioritizes features for the MVP scope, and ensures alignment with business goals
Gathers and refines requirements, maps user stories, and validates feasibility of MVP features
Creates wireframes and UI designs focused on core user flows for the MVP experience
Implements the entire application stack, building both frontend and backend components end-to-end
Validates functionality, runs smoke tests, and ensures the MVP meets quality thresholds before release
Produces setup guides, API docs, and user-facing documentation for the MVP deliverable
